task_description: Write an RFP response for a multinational retailer seeking an omnichannel inventory management and fulfillment platform.

input_data.rfp_issuer: GlobalMart International (Fortune 500 retailer, 2000+ stores across 15 countries)
input_data.responding_company: SupplySync Technologies (enterprise supply chain software company, 500 employees, serving 50+ retail brands)

rfp_requirements.scope: Replace fragmented regional inventory systems with a unified platform providing real-time inventory visibility across all stores, warehouses, and online channels. Enable ship-from-store, BOPIS, and dynamic fulfillment routing to minimize delivery time and cost.
key_requirements: Support for 50M+ SKUs across all regions
Integration with existing SAP ERP and Salesforce Commerce Cloud
Sub-second inventory availability checks for e-commerce
Support for regional compliance (EU, APAC, Americas)
